arts.ttl: Norwich City player ‘favourite’ target for club – Reasonable asking price could favour negotiations
arts.sum: On Monday, Corriere dello Sport reported Norwich City’s Borja Sainz has received offers from several clubs, but the Canaries are refusing to let him leave in January. The winger has managed 16 goals and two assists from 26 games and his performances haven’t gone unnoticed in Spain. arts.ttl: Terri Westgate: Nunez is a game saver among memories of Norwich City past
arts.sum: The twists and turns of a Championship season are often difficult to predict, and Norwich City fan columnist Terri Westgate I did not expect that matches against Queens Park Rangers to have such a negative influence on the Canaries' campaign.
